queries.question: Show intermediate online courses and textbooks.
queries.sql:
SELECT Textbooks.Title as Title
FROM Textbooks
WHERE Textbooks.Difficulty_Level = "Intermediate"
UNION
SELECT Online_Courses.Course_Name as Title
FROM Online_Courses
WHERE Online_Courses.Difficulty_Level = "Intermediate"
